description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the microsoft/dotnet:latest Docker image. Define a variable project set to NewTypes and two stages: build and test. Add a before_script that runs dotnet restore for all jobs. In the build stage add a build job that sets build_path to $project/src/$project, changes directory to that path, and runs dotnet build. In the test stage add a test job that sets test_path to $project/test/$project.Tests, changes directory to that path, and runs dotnet test.
